# Test PDF Fixtures

Place test PDFs in this directory for automated testing.

## Required Test Files

| File | Description | Phase |
|---|---|---|
| `simple_text.pdf` | Simple single-column text document | 1, 2 |
| `with_images.pdf` | Document with embedded images | 1, 3 |
| `bordered_table.pdf` | Document with bordered tables | 1, 3, 5 |
| `two_column.pdf` | Two-column academic paper layout | 3 |
| `mixed_formatting.pdf` | Bold, italic, code, links | 4 |
| `with_lists.pdf` | Bullet and numbered lists | 4 |
